# ci/active_workflows.txt — the CRIE "active workflow set" that CI statically validates.
#
# SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for which workflows the validator checks. The CI job and
# both local runners (run_local.ps1 / run_local.sh) invoke validate_workflows.py
# with NO path arguments, so they all read THIS file. To bring a new production
# workflow under validation, add a line below — do NOT edit ci.yml or the runners.
#
# Rules:
#   - One glob (or explicit path) per line, relative to the repo root.
#   - '#' comments and blank lines are ignored.
#   - Recursive '**' is supported.
#
# EXCLUDED BY DESIGN: the roadmap skeletons WF-002 / WF-003 / WF-004 / WF-005 are
# intentional placeholder stubs, not production workflows; validating them as if
# they were would raise false failures (dead nodes / no trigger path). Add them
# here once they become real, wired workflows.

# WF-001 Knowledge Ingestion (the one implemented master workflow)
workflows/master/WF-001*.json

# All shipped sub-workflows (WF-001 SWs + SW-016 Orphan Sweep under WF-005 SWs)
workflows/subworkflows/**/*.json
